mapper.select: SELECT ID , SUBJECT , CONTENT , EMAIL , VIEW_CNT , CRT_DT , MDFY_DT , FILE_NAME , ORIGIN_FILE_NAME FROM BOARD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD ( ID , SUBJECT , CONTENT , EMAIL , CRT_DT) VALUES ( 'BD-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD-') || LPAD(SEQ_BOARD_PK.NEXTVAL, 6, '0') , #{subject} , #{content} , #{email} , SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT ID , SUBJECT , CONTENT , EMAIL , VIEW_CNT , CRT_DT , MDFY_DT , FILE_NAME , ORIGIN_FILE_NAME FROM BOARD WHERE ID = #{_parameter}
